Document:
# Holographic Generators
Holographic Generators are machines that can be used to create permanent holograms for as long as the Generator is powered.
When a pair of Generators of the same type are placed facing eachother and connected to power, a field is formed between the 2 generators. Holographic Generators will only form connections when at full power and if the space between the 2 Generators isn't obstructed. The Holographic Generator will remain active until their internal batteries are fully drained. Both generators need to be powered to form a field.
Holographic Fields block atmospheric flow and can be used in the creation of airtight spaces that can be freely passed through. Additionally, they are resistant to radiation and heat.
Holographic Barriers are self regenerating impassable fields that can block crew, bullets... anything, really.
Holographic Barriers can be used in the creation of secure docks or as shields on a shuttle. However, the Generator itself is much weaker than the barriers they form and must be protected well.
